description: Letter from Avraham b. Yaʿish, in Constantinople/Istanbul. Dating: Probably Ottoman era; Avraham David suggests 16th century. He refers numerous times to the holy congregation(s) and their duties and good deeds and refers to 'the troubles (הטרדות).
description_he: מכתב בעברית מ-Constantinople. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
